description: Schema that indicates information to make it easier for humans to read the message such as names and a link to webpage

title.description: Human readable text to identify the event. When used at the event level it must include a title about the event as a global thing. When used as part of the data it must identify the particular data.
examples: Policy 'My new policy' triggered for system MySystem

href_url.description: Link to human readable content to see information regarding the event. When it's used at the event level it must include a link to see information about the event as a global thing. When used as part of the data it must include information about the data itself.
